Task.Name: Appoint Falcon Programme Leads (BGSW and JV)
Set Up PMO Tools and Collaboration Site
Signing - Frozen Zone Activated
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW + JV Executive | No AI IT production changes without SteerCo approval from this date

Task.Name: 1.2 BGSW AI IT Landscape Assessment (3 India Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT + Bosch BD/MIL | 3 India sites: Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune

Task.Name: AI IT Inventory Request (Apps / Infra / Devices)
Location List - 3 India Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT + Facilities | Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune

Task.Name: Legal Entity Identification - JV Registration India
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + Finance | JV entity registration in India; MCA filing; 50/50 shareholding structure

Task.Name: Identify AI IT Dependencies on BGSW Shared Services
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT Architects | Forms full TSA scope from BGSW shared services used by AI business

Task.Name: Draft Falcon Project Charter
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch BD/MIL + BGSW IT PM

Task.Name: Define Scope Boundaries - AI Business IT Only
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch BD/MIL + BGSW IT | <100 users; ~20 apps; No ERP; Combination JV model; 3 India sites

Task.Name: JV IT Structure and Sponsorship Agreement
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + Finance + BGSW | Confirm 50/50 JV IT ownership and BGSW-as-carver model

Task.Name: QG1 - Initialization Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Charter approved; full inventory confirmed; governance accepted; proceed to Concept Phase

Task.Name: Application Landscape Inventory (~20 AI Apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT Architects + Bosch BD/MIL | AI-specific apps only; flag BGSW shared platform dependencies

Task.Name: IT Infrastructure As-Is Mapping - 3 India Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Infra Team | Site surveys for Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune

Task.Name: Data Ownership and Separation Rules
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch BD/MIL + Legal | Identify AI data vs BGSW corporate data; confirm separation approach

Task.Name: Contract and Licence Inventory (~20 AI Apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Procurement + IT | Change of control clause review for all ~20 AI applications

Task.Name: HR IT Systems Mapping - AI Business Users
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW HR IT | India payroll and HR systems in scope for <100 AI users

Task.Name: 2.2 JV IT Architecture Design
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT Architects + Bosch BD/MIL

Task.Name: JV Architecture Concept Workshop (Combination Model)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW + JV Architects | Confirm Combination model; define JV IT target state alongside BGSW carver setup

Task.Name: Network Architecture Design - 3 India JV Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Infra + Bosch BD/MIL | JV LAN/WAN across India sites; domestic links sufficient; no international WAN required

Task.Name: Active Directory Design - JV Forest
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW AD Team | New AD forest for JV entity; fully separate from BGSW corporate AD

Task.Name: M365 and Azure Tenant Design - JV Entity
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Azure Team | New M365 tenant for JV; <100 mailboxes; Teams and OneDrive in scope

Task.Name: Security Architecture Design - JV Entity
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW CISO | JV security architecture independent of BGSW; ISO 27001 baseline

Task.Name: 2.3 AI IT Migration Strategy
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch BD/MIL + All WS Leads

Task.Name: Application Categorisation (~20 AI Apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch BD/MIL + WS Leads | All ~20 apps in single migration wave given small count

Task.Name: TSA Service Catalogue Definition
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT + JV IT | Services BGSW provides to JV under TSA; define exit criteria per service

Task.Name: JV IT Operating Model (post-TSA)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT Architects | JV standalone operating model after TSA exit; India-centric model

Task.Name: Risk Register Baseline
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch BD/MIL + All WS Leads

Task.Name: QG2 - Concept Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Architecture approved; JV model agreed; TSA catalogue defined; migration strategy approved; proceed to Development

Task.Name: Network Setup - 3 India JV Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Infra | JV LAN across Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune; domestic India connectivity

Task.Name: Server Infrastructure Build - JV (Cloud-first)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Infra | Cloud-first approach; minimal on-premise footprint

Task.Name: Active Directory Build - JV Forest
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW AD Team | Foundation for all JV users and ~20 AI applications

Task.Name: Azure and Cloud Environment Setup - JV
Security and IAM Platform Setup - JV
Application Reclassification and Assignment
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch BD/MIL + BGSW IT | Assign each of ~20 AI apps to JV or retain in BGSW carver

Task.Name: Application Adaptation for JV Environment (~20 Apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: Dev Teams | Re-point app configurations from BGSW to JV domain / AD / M365

Task.Name: Data Migration Preparation - AI Business Data
Device Inventory and Assessment - AI Users (<100 devices)
Device Reimaging and Configuration - JV Standard Image
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW CWP | JV domain image for <100 devices across 3 India sites

Task.Name: TSA Service Descriptions Finalised - 3 India Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT + JV IT | Each TSA service must have an exit date and acceptance criteria

Task.Name: TSA Contracts Legal Review and Finalisation
QG3 - Development Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | JV infra ready; all ~20 apps packaged; <100 devices configured; TSA contracts signed; proceed to Cutover

Task.Name: User Acceptance Testing (UAT)
Task.Notes: Resources: Business Key Users | JV IT and AI business users confirm Day 1 readiness

Task.Name: Security and Penetration Testing
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW CISO | JV environment penetration test; India data residency confirmed

Task.Name: End-User Communication - AI Business (<100 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Comms + BGSW IT | Communication to all AI users across 3 India sites

Task.Name: Help Desk Activation and Training - JV
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | India support coverage for JV AI users

Task.Name: QG4 - Pre-Cutover Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | UAT passed; <100 devices migrated; all AI apps live in JV; JV infra ready; cutover plan approved; Day 1 confirmed

Task.Name: Day 1 - JV IT GoLive (Legal Separation Effective)
Task.Notes: Resources: Executive Leadership | JV AI IT fully separated from BGSW; JV IT independent from this date

Task.Name: Network Domain Cutover to JV Active Directory
Application Day 1 Activation - All ~20 AI Apps
BGSW TSA Residual Services Activated
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT + JV IT | TSA clock starts 07 Dec 2026; minimal scope BGSW-to-JV services; exit target Mar 2027

Task.Name: 5.2 Hypercare - 30 Working Days
Task.Notes: Resources: All WS Leads + IT Ops

Task.Name: Daily Operations Review Meetings
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + WS Leads | India standup cadence; focus on JV AI systems stability

Task.Name: Incident Management and P1/P2 Issue Resolution
TSA SLA Compliance Monitoring
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | BGSW residual TSA tracked from Day 1; planned full exit by Mar 2027

Task.Name: 5.3 TSA Exit and BGSW Service Termination
TSA Exit Planning per Service
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + BGSW IT | Define exit criteria and acceptance tests per remaining TSA service

Task.Name: TSA Service Exit - All 3 India Sites
TSA Exit Confirmation (All BGSW Services Terminated)
QG5 - Programme Closure Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Hypercare stable; TSA fully exited; JV IT fully independent; Falcon programme formally closed
